payload.answer: I couldn't save the article as a durable memory because the fetch failed with a 404/network error. Please provide a working URL or paste the article content if you want it remembered for memory architecture.

entity_resolution.reason: The URL could not be fetched due to a 404/network error, so the article title, content, and durable facts are unavailable. Only the user's intent to remember it is known, which is insufficient for a durable memory card about the article.

details: No durable memory card was created because article content could not be verified.

repair_options: Provide a working URL for the article.
Paste the article title and content or a summary.
Confirm whether you want to remember only the inaccessible URL and your stated reason: useful for memory architecture.
